title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
